code: import api from'../services/api';export const toAbsoluteImageUrl=url=>{if(!url)return'';if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(url)||url.startsWith('data:')||url.startsWith('blob:')){return url;}const apiBaseUrl=api.defaults.baseURL||'';const origin=apiBaseUrl.replace(/\/api\/?$/,'');const normalizedPath=url.startsWith('/')?url:`/${url}`;return`${origin}${normalizedPath}`;};
